metadata.description: Routing-policy-driven web research for Claude Code: docs (Context7), semantic discovery (Exa), web facts (Tavily), URL fetch/crawl (Firecrawl), with Brave + DuckDuckGo fallbacks and audit receipts. Wraps the wsc CLI.

plugins.name: web-surfing-cli
plugins.description: Slash commands and a routing skill that drive the wsc CLI. Requires the wsc Python CLI installed separately via pipx (run /web-install if missing).
